name: PocketBase view collection behavior
pocketBaseNote: PocketBase view collections are read-only projections backed by SQL SELECT queries; Rusty Base keeps that spirit while adding an internal-table denylist and execution guard for unsafe view queries.

cases.name: view collection stores select query metadata
cases.pocketBaseNote: A valid view collection stores its SELECT viewQuery and returns view metadata.

cases.name: view list applies filters over projected columns
cases.pocketBaseNote: View collection list requests can filter against projected view columns.

cases.name: view get hides rows outside the query
cases.pocketBaseNote: A record excluded by the view query should not be readable through the view collection.

cases.name: view record create is rejected
cases.pocketBaseNote: View collections are read-only and should reject create attempts.

cases.name: view record update is rejected
cases.pocketBaseNote: View collections are read-only and should reject update attempts.

cases.name: view record delete is rejected
cases.pocketBaseNote: View collections are read-only and should reject delete attempts.

cases.name: view export includes view query
cases.pocketBaseNote: Collection export preserves the view collection type and original viewQuery.

cases.name: non-select view query is rejected
cases.pocketBaseNote: Only SELECT-style view queries are accepted for view collections.

cases.name: view query cannot read internal auth tables
cases.pocketBaseNote: System tables such as auth token storage are not available to user-defined view queries.

cases.name: unsafe view function is blocked at execution
cases.pocketBaseNote: View execution is guarded so unsafe SQLite functions cannot run through a view collection.
